overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character running through rainy urban streets at night, exploring a fire station with parked fire trucks, and approaching a commercial gas station area. The scene features wet reflective pavement, neon signage, street lights, and a moody noir atmosphere with distant skyscrapers visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk next to fenced residential area

events.description: character turns right at street corner and continues running along sidewalk

agents.ego_description: running steadily along wet sidewalk next to metal fences and small guard buildings

entered.detail: small white building with illuminated windows and gabled roof
tall black iron fence running along the sidewalk
tall pole with yellow sodium vapor lamp illuminating the rain
tall modern buildings with lit windows visible through the rainy haze

segments.scene_description: The character runs along a narrow wet sidewalk at night, passing a small guard house with warm interior lighting and tall metal fences. Street lights cast yellow glows through the heavy rain, while distant skyscrapers loom in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: street approaching fire station with parked vehicles

events.description: fire station building with open garage doors comes into view ahead on the left

agents.ego_description: running past parked cars along the sidewalk toward the fire station

entered.detail: modern two-story building with large garage bays and illuminated windows
dark sedans parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the sidewalk, the character runs past parked cars as the fire station building emerges ahead. The metal fence recedes into the distance while the fire station's illuminated bays become the focal point.

scene_state.functional_zone: fire station bay with open garage doors and parked fire trucks

events.description: character slows to walking speed and approaches fire truck for closer inspection

agents.ego_description: walking around the fire station bay examining the parked fire trucks and building interior

entered.detail: red Los Santos Fire Department engine with white stripes parked in the bay
second fire engine visible inside the garage bay
open garage area with red floor and overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: The character enters the fire station area, walking slowly around the parked red fire trucks. The sheltered bay provides relief from the rain, with bright interior lighting contrasting the dark night outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with gas station and convenience store

events.description: exiting fire station area and entering commercial street with gas station visible ahead
traffic light changes to green as character approaches the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking away from fire station toward the commercial area with gas station and billboards

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the wet street ahead of the character

entered.detail: illuminated gas station with yellow RON signage and convenience store
large illuminated advertisement for Cluckin' Bell restaurant
multi-story building with grid of lit windows dominating the skyline

segments.scene_description: Leaving the fire station, the character walks toward a commercial intersection featuring a RON gas station and bright billboards. A pedestrian crosses the wet street ahead as the traffic light turns green, with a tall office building rising prominently in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban night that shifts from a confined industrial perimeter to a bright commercial intersection. It begins with a character running along a narrow, wet sidewalk past a warmly lit guard house and tall metal fences, with distant skyscrapers looming through the heavy rain. As the character continues forward, the fences recede and the scene opens up to reveal the illuminated bays of a fire station. The camera then transitions into the sheltered bay, moving slowly around parked red fire trucks under bright interior lighting that contrasts with the dark storm outside. Finally, the character leaves the station and walks toward a vibrant commercial area featuring a RON gas station and glowing billboards, where a pedestrian crosses the reflective street beneath a towering office building.
